claim: Paige Ostroushko was arrested for assaulting reporter Savanah Hernandez during an anti-ICE protest, with videos showing the incident and charges to be filed.

sub_questions.question: Did an incident occur in which reporter Savanah Hernandez was assaulted during an anti-ICE protest?
Are there videos clearly showing the incident, and can we verify their date, location, and authenticity?
Was a person named Paige Ostroushko identified and arrested in connection with the incident? If so, by which police department and when?
Were criminal charges filed (or announced to be filed) against Paige Ostroushko, and what are the specific charges?
What is the attribution chain? Did @savsays originate the claim, and have independent outlets (police statements, court records, mainstream news) confirmed it?

notes: Absence of corroboration across multiple searches suggests either the incident is very recent/localized with limited indexing, the name is misspelled, or the claim may be unverified.
